title: Unexpected execution result
poc: SELECT * FROM t0 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM (VALUES (t0.c0)) WHERE TRUE);
key_bug_features: SELECT with NOT EXISTS returning unexpected results
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1(c1 INT, c2 VARCHAR(50));
CREATE TABLE t2(c3 INT NOT NULL, c4 FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
SELECT * FROM t1 WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM t2 WHERE t2.c3 = t1.c1);
